progress.title: Creating Entity
progress.description:
Creating entity. Please wait while this completes. Be aware that Contact Energy can take 24-72 hours to display the most recent energy usage data. Also, it may take several hours before historical data is scraped and displayed in Home Assistant.

This message will disappear when the integration is created.

abort.already_configured: Integration already configured for this contract
